title: Kodiyile Malligapoo Song Lyrics Kadalora Kavithaigal
stanzas:
kodiyile malligai poo
manakkudhe maane
edukkavaa thodukkavaa
thudikkiren naane.

parikka solli thoonduthe
pavala malli thottam
nerunga vida villaiye
nenjukulle koocham

kodiyile malligai poo
manakkudhe maane
kodukkavaa thadukkavaa
thavikkiren naane.

Manasu thadumaarum
adhu nenacha neram maarum
mayakkam irundhaalum
oru thayakkam thada podum

nitham nitham un nenappu
nenjukuli kaayum
maadu rendu paadha rendu
vandi engae serum

pothi vachaa anbu illa
solliputtaa vambu illa
sollathaane thembu illa
indha thunban yaaraala

parakkum dhesai yedhu
idha parava ariyaadhu
uravo theriyaadhu
adhu unakkum puriyaadhu

paaraiyile poo molachi
paappavaga yaaru
anbu konda nenjathukku
aayushu nooru.

kaalam varum velaiyila
kathiruppen pon mayile
thaeva varum unmaiyile
seidhi solven kannaale

kodiyile malligai poo
manakkudhe maane
kodukkavaa thadukkavaa
thavikkiren naane.

parikka solli thoonduthe
pavala malli thottam
nerunga vida villaiye
nenjukulle koocham

kodiyile malligai poo
manakkudhe maane
edukkavaa thodukkavaa
thudikkiren naane.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kodiyile Malligapoo?

The song beautifully captures the essence of romance and longing, set against a soothing melody.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary duo P. Jayachandran and S. Janaki.

Who composed the music for Kadalora Kavithaigal?

The music was composed by the maestro Ilaiyaraaja.

What is the release year of the movie Kadalora Kavithaigal?

The movie was released in the year 1986.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of love, nostalgia, and a sense of longing.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kodiyile Malligapoo from the movie Kadalora Kavithaigal is a romantic duet that beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. Sung by P. Jayachandran and S. Janaki, the melody is soothing and nostalgic, making it a timeless classic. The lyrics convey a sense of yearning and the beauty of love, set against Ilaiyaraaja's enchanting musical composition. This song remains a favorite for its heartfelt expression and melodious tune.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Kodiyile Malligapoo from the movie Kadalora Kavithaigal. This enchanting melody, brought to life by the legendary voices of P. Jayachandran and S. Janaki, captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. Let Ilaiyaraaja's magical composition transport you to a world of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: The jasmine flower on the vine is fragrant, my dear. Should I pick it or touch it? I am anxious.
I want to pluck it, but the coral jasmine garden is tempting. I feel shy inside.
The jasmine flower on the vine is fragrant, my dear. Should I give it or stop it? I am restless.
The mind is confused, and time changes when I think. Even if there is dizziness, hesitation stops it.
Every day, your thoughts hurt my heart. Where will the two-legged cart go?
If I keep it hidden, there is no love. If I say it, there is no trouble. Who can bear this sorrow?
Which direction to fly, the bird does not know. It does not know the relationship, and you do not understand it either.
Who will bloom flowers on the rock? For a loving heart, life is a hundred years.
I will wait for the right time, dear peacock. When the truth comes, I will tell you with my eyes.
The jasmine flower on the vine is fragrant, my dear. Should I give it or stop it? I am restless.
I want to pluck it, but the coral jasmine garden is tempting. I feel shy inside.
The jasmine flower on the vine is fragrant, my dear. Should I pick it or touch it? I am anxious.
